positive dollar value. If a prescription crosses the threshold, then the portion of the gross drug cost

SHORT NAME: GDCAOOPT 

LONG NAME: GDC_ABV_OOPT_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 13 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Field length expanded from 10 to 13 in 2025. Reference the GDC_BLW_OOPT_AMT variable for the 
portion of the gross drug cost that was not covered by Part D’s catastrophic coverage.
